_comment: Project configuration for the DeepEval golden session test suite. Fill in the fields below, then run capture_golden_session.py to record a golden session. Auto-sensed fields are merged into the generated profile.

agent_identity.role: Describe what this agent does — this is used by the LLM judge to evaluate conversation quality, role adherence, and completeness.
agent_identity.domain: What business domain does this agent serve?
agent_identity.off_topic_guidance: What topics should the agent refuse to answer?

workflows.description: High-level description of the multi-step workflow this agent drives.

hallucination_context: Add factual statements about what the agent can and should do.
These are used by the LLM judge to determine whether agent responses are grounded.
Include information about tools, integrations, data sources the agent accesses.
Include expected response patterns (e.g., 'The agent always asks X before Y').

tool_patterns._comment: Supplemental regex → tool name mappings. Auto-sensed patterns from the golden recording are merged in. Only add patterns here for tools the auto-sensor may miss.

step_agent_patterns._comment: Supplemental regex → step agent name. Auto-sensed patterns from content are merged in.

silent_upload_patterns._comment: Patterns in assistant text indicating a silent (text-free) file upload by the user.
